overview.mainTheme: 利率曲線較正常，宏觀壓力相對緩和，個股消息面主導

core.news: Walmart Stock is Sounding a Warning Bell for Investors, and It's Ringing Out at Its Loudest Since the 2008 Financial Crisis. History Paints…（Yahoo）
core.newsSummary: Investors have been worried about the economy and geopolitical factors.
core.judgement: 依新聞摘要初判：Investors have been worried about the economy and geopolitical factors.
core.observation: 留意 NVDA 是否延續 Yahoo 所反映的市場敘事。

core.news: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights NVIDIA, AMD, Applied Materials, Lam Research and Micron Technology（Yahoo）
core.newsSummary: Applied Materials and Lam Research surge on AI-driven chip demand, positioning themselves as "pick-and-shovel" plays riding the next wave of semiconductor growth.
core.judgement: 依新聞摘要初判：Applied Materials and Lam Research surge on AI-driven chip demand, positioning themselves as "pick-and-shovel" plays riding the next wave of semiconductor growth.
core.observation: 留意 AMD 是否延續 Yahoo 所反映的市場敘事。

watch.news: Apple's Unusual Market Dominance, Iran Retaliation List And More: This Week In Appleverse（Benzinga）
watch.newsSummary: This week's tech news highlights Apple and Nvidia outperforming defense stocks, Amazon's satellite ambitions, and Apple's 50th anniversary.

watch.newsSummary: 最近沒有抓到可用新聞。
watch.observation: ZETA 暫時以價格與量能為主，等待更多催化。

watch.news: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed（CNBC）
watch.newsSummary: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.

actionSummary.coreView: 目前僅使用免費的 Finnhub 與 FRED 來源，關鍵決策仍需人工複核。
